content.cn_text: 【旁白】：你将听到几段不同的录音，你需要回答关于你所听到的内容的问题。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what

content.cn_text: 内容。
content.en_text: you hear.

content.cn_text: 你将有时间阅读说明和问题，并且你将有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: to check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音都只播放一次。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 考试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four parts.

content.cn_text: 请将所有答案写在听力试题册上。
content.en_text: Write all your answers in the listening question booklet.

content.cn_text: 考试结束时，你将有十分钟时间将答案誊写到答题
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an answer

content.cn_text: 纸上。
content.en_text: sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到试题册第二页的第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to part one on page two of your question booklet.

content.cn_text: 第一部分
content.en_text: Part one

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位女士和一位公园管理员的电话对话。
content.en_text: You will hear a telephone conversation between a woman and a park ranger.

content.cn_text: 首先，你将有一些时间查看问题一到五。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions one to five.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听并回答问题一到五。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions one to five.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：杏仁谷罂粟保护区，很高兴为您服务。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Almond Valley Poppy Reserve may help you.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：自然保护区现在开放吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Is the nature reserve open now?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：是的，我们实际上全年开放，尽管现在是观赏野花的最佳时节。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Yes, we are actually open all year, although this is the best time of year to see the wild

content.cn_text: 野花。
content.en_text: flowers.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：罂粟花开了吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Are the poppies blooming yet?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：当然。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Absolutely.

content.cn_text: 它们上周就开始开花了，现在已经很美了，但它们应该在本月底达到盛花期并
content.en_text: They started to bloom last week and are already beautiful, but they should peak and be

content.cn_text: 盛开。
content.en_text: in full bloom at the end of the month.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：哦，我本来计划这周末来的。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Oh, I was planning on coming at the end of this week.

content.cn_text: 那是不是太早了？
content.en_text: Is that too early?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：不，一点也不。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: No, not at all.

content.cn_text: 山丘上已经覆盖着橙色的罂粟花。
content.en_text: The hills are already covered with orange poppies.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：我以为罂粟花是红色的。
content.en_text: [Woman]: I thought poppies were red.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：在加利福尼亚不是。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Not in California.

content.cn_text: 我在这里从未见过红色的罂粟花。
content.en_text: I've never seen a red poppy here.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：罂粟保护区在海洋县，对吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: The poppy reserve is in Ocean County, right?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：没错。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Right.

content.cn_text: 从湖畔出发，你需要向东行驶大约一小时。
content.en_text: From lakeside, you'll need to drive about an hour east.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：保护区什么时候开放？
content.en_text: [Woman]: What time does the reserve open?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：保护区从日出到日落开放。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: The reserve is open from sunrise to sunset.

content.cn_text: 最好早上早点来避开人群，但如果想拍出最好的照片，
content.en_text: It's best to come early in the morning to beat the crowds, but for the best photography,

content.cn_text: 你可能需要考虑在工作日下午中间时段参观。
content.en_text: you might want to consider a mid-afternoon visit on a weekday.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：我听说沙漠里有很多响尾蛇。
content.en_text: [Woman]: I heard that there are a lot of rattlesnakes in the desert.

content.cn_text: 走动危险吗？
content.en_text: Is it dangerous to walk about?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：这里的野生动物很安全。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: This wildlife is quite safe.

content.cn_text: 很少有人被响尾蛇咬伤，所以我们确实建议穿长裤
content.en_text: There are very few people bitten by rattlesnakes, so we do recommend wearing trousers just

content.cn_text: 以防万一。
content.en_text: to be on the safe side.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：好的。
content.en_text: [Woman]: All right.

content.cn_text: 我希望能有机会看到一些野生动物。
content.en_text: I was hoping that I might have the chance to see some wildlife too.

content.cn_text: 哦，保护区门票多少钱？
content.en_text: Oh, how much is the admission to the reserve?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：5美元。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: It's $5.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：我可以使用我的国家公园通行证进入保护区吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Can I use my national park pass to enter the reserve?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：很遗憾不能，因为它是一个州立公园，而不是国家公园。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Unfortunately not, since it is a state park, not a national park.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：好的。
content.en_text: [Woman]: All right.

content.cn_text: 我听朋友说有自然之旅。
content.en_text: I heard from a friend that there is a nature tour available.

content.cn_text: 你能告诉我详情吗？
content.en_text: Can you tell me about it?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：当然，但请您稍等一下好吗？
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Certainly, but can you excuse me just a sec?

content.cn_text: 我马上回来。
content.en_text: I'll be right back.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：好的。
content.en_text: [Woman]: OK.

content.cn_text: 【旁白】：现在请听并回答问题六到十。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Now listen and answer questions 6 to 10.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：你好？
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Hello?

content.cn_text: 【女士】：是的，我还在。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Yes, I'm still here.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：现在，你对自然之旅感兴趣，对吗？
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Now, you are interested in the nature tours, right?

content.cn_text: 【女士】：哦，不止一个。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Oh, there's more than one.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：是的。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Yes.

content.cn_text: 我们有普通（general）之旅，你朋友可能参加的就是这个。
content.en_text: We have the general tour, which is the one your friend may have taken.

content.cn_text: 但我们还有另外两个专业之旅。
content.en_text: But we also have two more specialized tours.

content.cn_text: 我们的普通之旅从早上7:30开始。
content.en_text: Starting at 7.30 a.m. is our general tour.

content.cn_text: 我知道这对一些人来说有点早。
content.en_text: That's early for some people, I know.

content.cn_text: 它也是每小时都有。
content.en_text: It's offered every hour, too.

content.cn_text: 但那是很棒的时间，而且只持续30分钟。
content.en_text: But it's a great time, and it only lasts 30 minutes.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：那是带你去观景点（vista points）的旅行吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Is that the tour that takes you to the vista points?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：是的，那是亮点之一，还有一部介绍公园的影片和博物馆。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Yes, that is one of the highlights, along with a film introducing the park and the museum.

content.cn_text: 欢迎您随时参观博物馆。
content.en_text: You're welcome to tour the museum at your leisure.

content.cn_text: 对于那些只想用自动相机拍摄全景照片的人来说，这是一个很棒的旅行。
content.en_text: It's a great tour for those who just want to take panoramic pictures with automatic cameras.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：嗯，如果我大老远来了，我希望能参加一个更详细的旅行。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Well, if I come all that way, I'd like to have a more detailed tour.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：那你很幸运，因为我们每两小时就有一个精彩的野花之旅，从早上8点开始。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Then you are in luck because we have a wonderful wildflower tour every two hours from 8 a.m.

content.cn_text: 它持续一小时，志愿者会向你介绍保护区里的许多花卉
content.en_text: It lasts one hour, and the volunteer will give you information about many of the flowers

content.cn_text: 的种类。
content.en_text: on the reserve.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：除了罂粟花，杯状花也会开花吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Besides the poppies, will cream cups be in bloom?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：是的，你还会看到很多鼠尾草。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Yes, and you will see lots of sage, too.

content.cn_text: 我们有一位志愿者非常擅长提供近距离摄影的技巧。
content.en_text: We have a volunteer who is really good at giving tips on close-up photography.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：你提到了另一个旅行。
content.en_text: [Woman]: You mentioned another tour.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：是的，最后一个是野生动物之旅，但它的提供时间非常有限。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Yes, the last one is the wildlife tour, but it is offered at very limited times.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：那是因为大多数野生动物是夜行动物吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Is that because most of the wildlife is nocturnal?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：是的，所以我们只提供两次这个旅行，早上5:30或晚上7:00。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Yes, so we offer this tour only two times, 5.30 a.m. or 7.00 p.m.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：哇，那么早，但是蛇和蜥蜴不喜欢太阳吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Wow, that early, but don't the snakes and lizards like the sun?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：没错。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Right.

content.cn_text: 首先，让我说大约需要一个半小时，但你将有机会
content.en_text: First let me say it takes about an hour and a half, but you will have the opportunity to

content.cn_text: 看到其他动物，比如郊狼、鹌鹑和走鹃。
content.en_text: see other animals like coyotes, quail, and roadrunners.

content.cn_text: 你必须在人群到来之前或他们大部分离开之后到达这里。
content.en_text: You have to get here before the crowds arrive or after most of them leave.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：嗯，这很有道理。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Well, that makes sense.

content.cn_text: 需要走很多路吗？
content.en_text: Does it require a lot of walking?

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：更像是长时间站立，但大部分时间你会在一两个地点。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: More like a lot of standing, but most of the time you will be at one or two locations.

content.cn_text: 所以如果你想拍照，我们建议带一个三脚架和变焦镜头。
content.en_text: So we recommend bringing a tripod and zoom lens if you want to take pictures.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：嗯，非常感谢你。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Well, thank you very much.

content.cn_text: 你非常乐于助人，提供了很多信息。
content.en_text: You've been extremely helpful and informative.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：不客气。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: You're welcome.

content.cn_text: 很高兴能为您服务。
content.en_text: Glad I could be of service.

content.cn_text: 【女士】：再见。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Goodbye.

content.cn_text: 【公园管理员】：再见。
content.en_text: [Park Ranger]: Goodbye.

content.cn_text: 【旁白】：第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of Part 1.

content.cn_text: 现在你有一分钟时间检查第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have one minute to check your answers to Part 1.

groups.desc: Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–5.

items.title: The poppies will be at their best at the end of the 1. ________.
The poppies on the hills are 2. ________ in colour.
The reserve is located to the 3. ________ of Lakeside.

groups.source_collect:
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
Poppy Reserve
• The poppies will be at their best at the end of the $1$.
• The poppies on the hills are $2$ in colour.
• The reserve is located to the $3$ of Lakeside.
• The best time for photography is mid-afternoon.
• Wear $4$ because of rattlesnakes.
• The reserve is a $5$ park.

groups.desc: Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER.
groups.title: Questions 6–10.
groups.source_collect: Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER.

source_label: 🍠@Listening 永不虾滑 · 仅供个人学习
source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
